title: Golden Globes Winners List 2026
text: Best Actress in a Motion Picture - Musical or Comedy. Winner: Rose Byrne for 'If I Had Legs I'd Kick You'. Coverage Details: The 2026 Golden Globes ceremony, held on January 11 and hosted by Nikki Glaser, featured this award among numerous film and television categories. Byrne's win places her alongside other notable winners from the evening, including Jessie Buckley (Best Actress - Drama) and Timothée Chalamet (Best Actor - Musical or Comedy). The other nominees in this category were: Cynthia Erivo ('Wicked: For Good'); Kate Hudson ('Song Sung Blue'); Chase Infiniti ('One Battle After Another'); Amanda Seyfried ('The Testament of Ann Lee'); Emma Stone ('Bugonia').
